creator: freebsd@igalic.co
text:
so, yes, i can reproduce the issue on Plasma 5 as well.

there's this, issue, which is gnome specific:

[Gnome] Tray icon does not appear when running on startup #57 
https://github.com/Fushko/gammy/issues/57

and i think it might be good to open the KDE issue as well.
https://github.com/Fushko/gammy/issues/76
